title: Felix′s QOL Modpack
description: This is a modpack to enhance and fix the game while staying close to vanilla, making for a great first experience.
body:
This modpack transforms Minecraft into the ultimate experience it was always meant to be, making it especially great for a first playthrough. 

# Enjoy features like:

- Bedrock Edition exclusive features
- Controller support
- VR support
- Faster rendering (higher FPS)
- Bug fixes
- Shader support
- Dynamic lighting
- In-game voice chat
- Extremely high render distance with LODs
- Automatic /login functionality on servers
- Easy world hosting for friends
- Joining servers on any version
- Borderless windowed
- Connected textures
- No data collection by Microsoft
- Player heads on the locator bar
- Preconfigured settings

And much more. Check out the list of mods for details!

These mods are preconfigured in a way to make them extremely unobtrusive, to retain a clean, clutterfree main menu and options menu. It really is just the base game, simply enhanced.
